name: compliance-tools
description: Enterprise compliance and GRC skills — audit automation, vendor risk scoring, evidence provenance, and more.
author: Adhithya Rajasekaran

plugins.name: compliance-auditor
plugins.description: Full GRC compliance engine — document scanning, gap analysis, maturity scoring, cross-framework mapping, interactive audit workspace, vendor scoring, evidence provenance, NL audit queries. Supports ISO 27001, SOC 2, HIPAA, NIST CSF, PCI DSS. Enterprise integrations with Google Workspace and Microsoft 365.
